originalTitle: Pilots killed in LaGuardia plane crash named
title: Learning to Fly Safely: A Big Airport Lesson!
content:
Hello from Africa!

Hello, my wonderful friends! It's your friendly reporter from sunny Africa here. I hope you're having a super day! Today, we're going to talk about something very important and very cool: aeroplanes and how we keep them safe. Have you ever looked up and seen a big aeroplane flying high in the sky? They look like giant birds, don't they? They carry people to many different places all around the world, even to places far, far away!

What Are Aeroplanes and Who Flies Them?

Aeroplanes are amazing machines that let us travel really fast. They fly so high, sometimes above the clouds, where you can't even see them from the ground! Inside the aeroplane, there are special people called pilots. Pilots are like the captains of a ship, but for the sky! They sit in a special front part of the plane called the cockpit. Their most important job is to make sure everyone on the plane is safe and that the plane flies smoothly. Did you know? The very first aeroplane flew over 100 years ago! It was much smaller than the planes we see today, and it only flew for a very short time. Imagine that!

Airports: Homes for Aeroplanes

Aeroplanes need special homes where they can start their journeys and land safely. These homes are called airports. If you've ever been to an airport, you know it's a very busy place! There are lots of big buildings and long, flat roads. These long, flat roads are called runways. Runways are like special super-highways just for aeroplanes to take off and land. It's very important that nothing else is on the runway when a plane is taking off or landing!

The Tall Control Tower

At every big airport, you will see a very tall building that looks like a giant's telescope! This is called the control tower. Inside the control tower are very special people called air traffic controllers. These controllers have a very important job! They watch over the whole airport, like a helpful guide. They talk to all the pilots in the aeroplanes and to all the other special vehicles that move around the airport. They tell everyone when it is safe to move, when to wait, and when to go. It's like they are the traffic police for the airport, making sure everything is orderly and safe. They use special radios to talk to the pilots and make sure everyone understands each other perfectly. Did you know? Air traffic controllers use a special way of speaking on the radio, using clear words and numbers, so there are no misunderstandings!

A Story About Learning from Mistakes

Our story today is about something that happened at an airport far away, called LaGuardia. It's a busy airport. One day, a big plane was ready to move. And at the same time, a big fire truck, a very important emergency vehicle, also needed to move. The people in the control tower, who guide everyone, told *both* the big plane *and* the big fire truck that it was okay to cross the runway. Oh dear! Imagine two cars trying to drive on the exact same spot at the exact same time! That's what happened. This was a mistake. The pilots in the plane were very brave people, and it was a very sad day for everyone. But when sad things happen, we must learn from them to make sure they never happen again. Did you know? Airport fire trucks are extra strong and carry special foam, not just water, to put out airplane fires super fast if there's an emergency!

The Airport Detectives: Investigators

When something like this happens, it's very, very important to find out exactly why. So, special people called investigators come to the airport. They are like detectives! They look for clues everywhere. They listen to the recordings of what the pilots and the controllers said to each other. They check all the rules and all the equipment. Their job is to understand every single detail of what went wrong. Why do they do all this hard work? So that everyone can learn from it and make sure such a mistake never, ever happens again!

Why Talking Clearly is So Important

This story teaches us a very big lesson about talking. It shows us how important it is to talk clearly and to listen carefully. The air traffic controllers need to speak clearly to the pilots, and the pilots need to speak clearly to the control tower. Everyone needs to understand each other perfectly, with no confusion. Sometimes, even a tiny mix-up in talking can cause big problems. So, clear talking, clear listening, and making sure you understand are super, super important, not just at airports, but everywhere! Did you know? Pilots and controllers often repeat important messages back to each other, like saying "Roger, understood!" This is a clever way to double-check that they heard correctly!

Making Airports Even Safer for Everyone

Airports all around the world, including the ones here in our beautiful Africa, work incredibly hard to be very safe places. They have lots and lots of rules. They have many clever people checking everything all the time. They learn from every single thing that happens, big or small. When the investigators find out why a mistake happened, everyone learns new ways to be even safer. Maybe they change a rule, or teach the controllers something new, or add new safety checks. All these things make flying safer for you and me, and everyone who loves to fly. Did you know? Before every single flight, pilots walk all around their plane, checking everything to make sure it's perfect and ready to fly safely!

Flying is Still a Wonderful Adventure!

Even though we talked about a sad story and a mistake, it's important to remember that flying in an aeroplane is still one of the safest ways to travel in the world! Millions and millions of planes fly safely every single day, all over the world. People are always working to learn from anything that goes wrong to make things better and better. So, the next time you see a plane zooming across the sky, remember all the smart and brave people – the pilots, the air traffic controllers, and the investigators – who work together like a big team to keep everyone safe in the air. From your reporter here in Africa, we know how important safety is. Our airports and brave pilots also work very hard every day. We learn from stories like this to make sure our skies are friendly and safe for everyone. Keep dreaming big dreams, my little friends! Maybe one day you'll be a pilot or an air traffic controller, helping to keep our skies safe too! Until next time, stay curious and stay safe!
summary: At an airport far away, investigators found that a big plane and a fire truck were told to cross the same runway at the same time, causing a sad mistake, and now everyone is learning from it to make flying super safe for everyone.
whyMatters: This is important because it teaches us how everyone works together to make sure aeroplanes are safe to fly, and why talking and listening carefully are so important to prevent mistakes at busy airports everywhere, including in Africa.

originalTitle: 'It wasn't meant to end like this' - Salah exit tough but inevitable
title: Our Super Star Mo Salah is Starting a New Adventure!
content:
Hey there, amazing kids of Africa! It's your friendly reporter here, bringing you some big news from the world of football. We're talking about our very own superhero, Mohamed Salah! He's the super fast, super smiley, and super goal-scoring king from Egypt!

Who is Mohamed Salah? Our African Football Hero!

Imagine a lightning bolt with a football at its feet, always scoring amazing goals and making everyone cheer! That's Mohamed Salah for you! He's not just a football player; he's a true inspiration from our wonderful continent, Africa. He has a big, kind smile and plays with so much heart. When he plays, it's like magic! He makes the ball dance and fly into the goal. He's so fast that defenders find it hard to catch him. He zooms past them like a speedy cheetah! Did you know? Mohamed Salah is from a country called Egypt, right here in Africa! He makes all of Africa super proud every time he plays.

His Wonderful Home Team: Liverpool FC

For many years, Mo Salah played for a famous team called Liverpool FC. Think of a team like a big family, and Liverpool was like his football family. Their special home field, where they played their games, is called Anfield. Anfield is a very big stadium, full of cheering fans who sing and jump when Mo Salah scores. He spent a long time there, scoring so many goals and helping his team win many shiny trophies. He was truly like a king on the field! Did you know? During his time at Liverpool, Mo Salah helped them win some of the biggest football prizes, like the Premier League and the Champions League! Wow!

What is a 'Contract' Anyway?

Now, sometimes, grown-ups talk about 'contracts' in football. What is that? Well, imagine you make a special promise to your friends that you will always play on their team. A contract is a bit like that – but for grown-ups and their jobs. It's a special piece of paper, like a big promise, that says a player will play for a certain team for a certain time. A little while ago, less than a year, Mo Salah signed a new promise paper with Liverpool. This meant he promised to stay with them for more years. Everyone was so happy! It was like saying, "Yay! Our superhero is staying with us for a long, long time!" But sometimes, things change, even with big promises.

Why is Our Hero Starting a New Chapter?

This is the big news: Mohamed Salah is getting ready to leave Liverpool FC. It's a bit sad, like saying goodbye to a good friend, but sometimes things change in life, and that's okay. Even though he signed a new promise paper not long ago, sometimes players feel it's time for a new adventure. Maybe they want to try a new place, meet new teammates, or take on a new challenge. It's like when you finish one class at school and get ready to move to the next exciting class! Did you know? Football players often move from one team to another during their careers. It's a normal part of their journey, even for the very best players like Mo Salah.

Saying Goodbye is Hard, But We're Still Proud!

It might feel a little bit tough to hear that our Mo Salah is leaving his team. Many fans, kids and grown-ups alike, will miss seeing him play in that famous red shirt. He brought so much joy and so many exciting moments. But even though he's moving on, we should remember all the amazing things he did. He scored incredible goals, he showed us how to be a great sportsman, and he always represented Africa with so much pride and a big, happy smile. He made us believe that kids from Africa can become the best in the world! He showed us that with hard work and a kind heart, you can achieve anything. That's a lesson we will always remember.

What's Next for Mo Salah? New Adventures Await!

So, what happens now for our football king? Well, we might see him playing for a new team, maybe in a new country! He will keep scoring goals, keep running fast, and keep making people happy with his amazing football skills. Wherever he goes, he will always be our Mohamed Salah, the kid from Africa who became a global football superstar. We will cheer for him no matter what team he plays for! Did you know? Many young boys and girls across Africa dream of playing football like Mo Salah. He shows them that dreams can come true!

Our Message to Our Hero!

So, from all of us here in Africa, to our amazing Mo Salah: Thank you for the goals, thank you for the smiles, and thank you for making us so incredibly proud. We wish you all the best on your new adventure! Keep shining brightly, our African king of football!
summary: Mohamed Salah, Africa's superstar football player, is leaving his team Liverpool FC for a new adventure, even though it's sad, we are still very proud of him.
whyMatters: This is important because Mohamed Salah is a big hero from Africa who shows all kids that they can achieve their dreams if they work hard, and he will continue to inspire us wherever he plays.

originalTitle: Premier League great Salah will leave lifetime of memories
title: Premier League great Salah will leave lifetime of memories
content: Mohamed Salah will leave Liverpool as an all-time great and iconic Premier League figure, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

title: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Bompastor
